examples.title: FastAPI Endpoint Implementation with Tests
examples.description: Implement a REST endpoint with input validation, error handling, and test coverage.

input.context: Add a POST /api/v1/agents endpoint to the AuDHD agents API. Accepts agent config JSON. Validates against schema. Stores in SQLite. Returns 201 with agent ID.

code_blocks.content:
# agents/api/routes/agents.py
from fastapi import APIRouter, HTTPException, status
from pydantic import BaseModel, validator
# ... implementation with error handling, logging, type hints

test_blocks.content:
# tests/test_agents_route.py
import pytest
from httpx import AsyncClient
# ... tests: happy path, validation error, duplicate, missing fields

examples.title: Code Review with Security Focus
examples.description: Review a Python module for security issues and provide fix diffs.

input.context: Review the authentication module for the agents API. Focus on security.

existing_code.content: # Example code with SQL injection vuln, weak hashing, missing rate limiting

expected_output.findings_table:
| Severity | Category | File:Line | Description | Fix |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| critical | security | auth.py:23-25 | SQL injection in user lookup [OBS] | Parameterized query |
| high | security | auth.py:42 | MD5 hashing for passwords [OBS] | bcrypt or argon2 [GEN] |
| medium | security | auth.py:1-60 | No rate limiting on auth endpoint [DRV] | Add rate limiter middleware [GEN] |

examples.title: Debug from Stack Trace (Low Energy)
examples.description: Diagnose a production error from a stack trace at low energy.

input.context: Production error: KeyError in agent routing. Stack trace shows failure in router.py line 87 when processing agent handoff.

expected_output.hypothesis_table:
| Hypothesis | Evidence | Confidence | Tag |
|---|---|---|---|
| Missing agent key in routing table | KeyError at router.py:87 | 0.8 | [DRV] |
| Agent config not loaded at startup | Handoff triggers dynamic lookup | 0.5 | [SPEC] |
expected_output.quick_fix: Add key existence check with default fallback at router.py:87. [GEN]
expected_output.energy_note: Low energy: hypothesis table + quick fix only. No deep trace analysis. Escalate if fix doesn't resolve.
